_doc.purpose: Localization companion for item_gamecd_ic6.json. Holds en-us entries for the knowledge_game_ic6_* flavor-text cluster.
_doc.naming_convention: Per user decision 2026-07-22: faction/character/location names are parody-renamed in the same light spirit as the title itself (Armored Core 6 -> Iron Core 6), not translated to their real official localizations. See name_consistency.md for the full substitution table. The five knowledge_game_ic6_characters_rusty_N quotes were already written in English directly in the zh-cn source (official VO lines quoted as-is) - copied verbatim, not retranslated. '621' is kept unchanged (a plain numeric callsign, not a proprietary name).
_doc.ac6_reference_note: Critical: 'ac6_reference' itself needed an en-us entry too, distinct from item_gamecd_ic6 (which hardcodes 'Iron Core 6' directly rather than using the token). Every knowledge_game_ic6_* entry below embeds %%ac6_reference%%, so without this entry the token would render literally as 'ac6_reference' in English builds instead of resolving.

en-us.knowledge_game_ic6_mech_generator: Mech generators and EN management in %%ac6_reference%%
en-us.knowledge_game_ic6_characters_rusty_0: You ready to climb the Wall?
en-us.knowledge_game_ic6_characters_rusty_2: Are you here to bring us hope, or despair?
en-us.knowledge_game_ic6_characters_rusty_3: You flew just out of reach...
